name: Dam
description: You are standing on top of Flood Control Dam #3, a broad concrete span built to inspire confidence through mass alone. Once a destination, it now functions without commentary or ceremony. Paths extend north, south, and west, while a rough scramble leads down the face of the structure. Behind the dam lies a wide reservoir basin, its surface held in place by decisions made elsewhere. Nearby, a control panel supports a large metal bolt, with a small green plastic bubble mounted above it, quietly suggesting that someone once believed monitoring mattered.
